tima 2.11.0

    • 2 Preparing inputs
    • 3 Performing Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation
    • 4 Benchmarking Performance
  • Changelog

3 Performing Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation

Adriano Rutz

2024-11-21

Source: vignettes/articles/III-processing.Rmd
III-processing.Rmd

This vignette describes how Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation is performed. If you followed all previous steps successfully, this should be a piece of cake, you deserve it!

targets::tar_make(names = tidyselect::matches("ann_pre$"))
#> ✔ skipped target yaml_paths
#> ✔ skipped target paths
#> ✔ skipped target par_pre_par

#> ✔ skipped target lib_mer_str_tax_npc
#> ✔ skipped target lib_mer_key
#> ✔ skipped target lib_mer_org_tax_ott
#> ✔ skipped target ann_sir_pre
#> ✔ skipped target ann_spe_exp_gnp_pre
#> ✔ skipped target ann_spe_pre
#> ✔ skipped target ann_ms1_pre
#> ✔ skipped target tax_pre
#> ✔ skipped target ann_sir_pre_for
#> ✔ skipped target ann_sir_pre_can
#> ✔ skipped target ann_sir_pre_str
#> ✔ skipped target ann_ms1_pre_edg
#> ✔ skipped target ann_ms1_pre_ann
#> ✔ skipped target fea_edg_pre
#> ✔ skipped target ann_fil
#> ✔ skipped target fea_com
#> ✔ skipped target int_com
#> ✔ skipped target fea_com_pre
#> ▶ dispatched target ann_pre
#> 2024-11-21 15:13:56 Loading files ... 
#> 2024-11-21 15:13:56 ... components 
#> 2024-11-21 15:13:56 ... edges 
#> 2024-11-21 15:13:56 ... structure-organism pairs 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:00 ... canopus 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:00 ... formula 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:00 ... annotations 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:02 Got c("ISDB", "TIMA MS1") initial annotations 
#>  2024-11-21 15:14:02 Got c(976, 289567) initial annotations 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:03 Re-arranging annotations 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:04 adding biological organism metadata 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:05 performing taxonomically informed scoring 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:05 filtering top  3  candidates and keeping only MS1 candidates with minimum 
#>  0  biological score 
#>  OR 0 chemical score 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:05 adding "notClassified" 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 calculating biological score at all levels ... 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... domain 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... kingdom 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... phylum 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... class 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... order 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... family 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... tribe 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... genus 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... species 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... varietas 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:06 ... keeping best biological score 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:08 ... calculating weighted biological score 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:08 taxonomically informed scoring led to 
#>  47463 annotations reranked at the kingdom level, 
#>  47000 annotations reranked at the phylum level, 
#>  39309 annotations reranked at the class level, 
#>  11409 annotations reranked at the order level, 
#>  9386 annotations reranked at the family level, 
#>  1538 annotations reranked at the tribe level, 
#>  1220 annotations reranked at the genus level, 
#>  464 annotations reranked at the species level, 
#>  and 0 annotations reranked at the variety level. 
#>  WITHOUT TAKING CONSISTENCY SCORE INTO ACCOUNT! (for later predictions) 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:09 calculating chemical consistency
#>               features with at least 2 neighbors ... 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:09 ... among all edges ... 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:09 ... at the (classyfire) kingdom level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:09 ... at the (NPC) pathway level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:09 ... at the (classyfire) superclass level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:10 ... at the (NPC) superclass level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:10 ... at the (classyfire) class level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:11 ... at the (NPC) class level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:12 ... at the (classyfire) parent level 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:13 splitting already computed predictions 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:14 joining all except -1 together 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:16 adding dummy consistency for features
#>               with less than 2 neighbors 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:16 adding already computed predictions back 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 calculating chemical score at all levels ... 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 ... (classyfire) kingdom 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 ... (NPC) pathway 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 ... (classyfire) superclass 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 ... (NPC) superclass 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 ... (classyfire) class 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:17 ... (NPC) class 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:18 ... (classyfire) parent 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:18 ... keeping best chemical score 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:18 ... calculating weighted chemical score 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:18 chemically informed scoring led to 
#>  36532 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) kingdom level, 
#>  24010 annotations reranked at the (NPC) pathway level, 
#>  17648 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) superclass level, 
#>  10212 annotations reranked at the (NPC) superclass level, 
#>  17648 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) class level, 
#>  9895 annotations reranked at the (NPC) class level, and 
#>  9413 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) parent level. 
#>  WITHOUT TAKING CONSISTENCY SCORE INTO ACCOUNT! 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:19 Keeping high confidence candidates only... 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:19 Removed 289254 low confidence candidates out of the 291283 total ones. 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:19 2029 high confidence candidates remaining. 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:20 adding initial metadata (RT, etc.) and simplifying columns 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:20 adding references 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:21 selecting columns to export 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:21 adding consensus again to droped candidates 
#>  
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:24 Exporting ... 
#> Directory data/processed/241121_151424_example created.
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:24 ... path to used parameters is data/processed/241121_151424_example 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:24 ... path to used parameters is data/processed/241121_151424_example 
#> 2024-11-21 15:14:24 ... path to export is data/processed/241121_151424_example/example_results.tsv 
#> ● completed target ann_pre [27.795 seconds, 2.33 megabytes]
#> ▶ ended pipeline [32.175 seconds]
#>

The final exported file is formatted in order to be easily imported in Cytoscape to further explore your data!

We hope you enjoyed using TIMA and are pleased to hear from you!

For any remark or suggestion, please fill an issue or feel free to contact us directly.

On this page

Developed by Adriano Rutz.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.1.
